name: HamsterBall Soccer
short_description: Hamsterball Soccer is a funny football game with simple mechanics. Challenge the AI or your friends in two modes where you can play with up to 8 players in 18 levels with its own unique characteristics. Share your controllers to play with a maximum number of players. A game for the whole family.
detailed_description:
Discover Hamsterball Soccer, an original football game with simple and innovative mechanics, featuring cartoonish hamsters.
Challenge the AI or compete against your friends in captivating matches, whether in turn-based or real-time mode, accommodating up to 8 players locally.



Win different cups to unlock new skins for the ball and hamsters, as well as undiscovered levels among the existing 18. Each level has its own specific features, from cannons to pinball machines, table soccer, and doors to open. These obstacles will make your matches with friends as enjoyable as they are unforgettable, in diverse worlds.

Choose your preferred controller style using a mouse, gamepad, or keyboard. Maximize the number of players with a minimum number of controllers; for example, five players can play with just one gamepad simultaneously: one player can use the mouse, two others can share the keyboard, and two more can share a gamepad.



Are you ready to take on the challenge of these frantic matches?

Hamsterball Soccer is undoubtedly an entertaining game for the whole family.
